zh.lifeSummary: 當Giles Chapman Jr.於1702年1月4日出生在英國越可爾布利德林頓時，他的父親Giles Chapman Sr.50歲，母親ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson28歲。他於1728年1月24日與Sarah H Jackson在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1789年12月17日在美國南卡羅來納州紐貝利紐貝利普洛斯利特享年87歲，埋葬在美國南卡羅來納州紐貝利紐貝利普洛斯利特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Giles Chapman Jr.于1702年1月4日出生在英国越可爾布利德林頓时，他的父亲Giles Chapman Sr.50岁，母亲ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson28岁。他于1728年1月24日与Sarah H Jackson在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1789年12月17日在美国南卡罗来纳州紐貝利紐貝利普洛斯利特享年87岁，埋葬在美国南卡罗来纳州紐貝利紐貝利普洛斯利特。

nameMeanings.name: Chapman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a merchant or trader, Middle English chap(pe)man, chepman, Old English cēapmann, cēpemann, a compound of cēap ‘barter, bargain, price, property’ + mann ‘man’.
Jewish: adopted probably for a like-sounding or like-meaning name in some other European language; see for example   Kaufman  .

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. John Chapmen (sic) was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

variants.name: Kaufman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Chaim, Emanuel, Moshe, Eytan, Herschel, Zvi, Ari, Aron.
Americanized form of German   Kaufmann  , and a variant of the same Jewish surname.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Kaufman meaning ‘merchant’. Compare Koyfman 2.

variants.name: Chipman
meanings: English: from Middle English chipman (Old English cȳp(e)mann), a side form of chapman, chepman ‘merchant, trader’; see Chapman , with which this name was interchangeable.

variants.name: Copeman
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): patronymic from the early Middle English personal name Cop(e)man, an Anglicized form of Old Scandinavian Kaupmaðr. It is a transferred use of Old Scandinavian kaupmaðr (Old Danish køpman) ‘merchant’, cognate with Old English cēapmann (see Chapman ), but there is no evidence for the occupational term in Middle English.
Americanized form of North German   Koopmann   or Dutch   Koopman  .

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

historicEvents.title: Gregorian Calendar is Adopted
historicEvents.description: Gregorian calendar was adopted in England in 1752. That year, Wednesday, September 2, 1752, was followed by Thursday, September 14th, 1752, which caused the country to skip ahead eleven days.

historicEvents.title: Seven Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Seven Years' War began as a North American conflict then stretched between England and France. England, along with allies, battled France in America, India, and Europe, making it arguably the first global war. The conflict ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris in 1763 and England was victorious. The Seven Years' war ultimately led to discontent in the colonies and the American Revolution.

historicEvents.title: Boston Tea Party
historicEvents.description: Thousands of British troops were sent to Boston to enforce Britain's tax laws. Taxes were repealed on all imports to the American Colonies except tea. Americans, disguised as Native Americans, dumped chests of tea imported by the East India Company into the Boston Harbor in protest. This escalated tensions between the American Colonies and the British government.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

en.lifeSummary: When Giles Chapman Jr. was born on 4 January 1702, in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England, his father, Giles Chapman Sr., was 50 and his mother, ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson, was 28. He married Sarah H Jackson on 24 January 1728, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 17 December 1789, in Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, South Carolina, United States, at the age of 87, and was buried in Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, South Carolina, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Giles Chapman Jr. est né le 4 janvier 1702, à Bridlington, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Giles Chapman Sr., avait 50 ans et sa mère, ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Sarah H Jackson le 24 janvier 1728, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 décembre 1789, à Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis.

Lui sposato Sarah H Jackson il 24 gennaio 1728, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 dicembre 1789, nel Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Giles Chapman Jr.が1702年1月4日にイギリスヨークシュアイアブリドリントンで生まれた時，父Giles Chapman Sr.は50歳，母ElizabethVan Winkle Andersonは28歳であった。1728年1月24日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでSarah H Jacksonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1789年12月17日にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州ニューバーリーニューバーリープロスペリトイで87歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州ニューバーリーニューバーリープロスペリトイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Giles Chapman Jr.(이)가 1702년 1월 4일 영국 요르크실르 브리들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Giles Chapman Sr.(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1728년 1월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Sarah H Jackson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1789년 12월 17일 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 뉴베리 뉴베리 프로스페리티에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 뉴베리 뉴베리 프로스페리티에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Giles Chapman Jr. nasceu em 4 de janeiro de 1702, em Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Giles Chapman Sr., tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah H Jackson em 24 de janeiro de 1728, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de dezembro de 1789, em Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Giles Chapman Jr. родился 4 января 1702 г. в местности бридлингтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Giles Chapman Sr. было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah H Jackson 24 января 1728 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 декабря 1789 г. в местности проспирити, нюбирри, нюбирри, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности проспирити, нюбирри, нюбирри, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Giles Chapman Jr. nació el 4 de enero de 1702, en Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Giles Chapman Sr., tenía 50 años y su mamá, ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sarah H Jackson el 24 de enero de 1728, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de diciembre de 1789, en Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos.
